title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Curefit - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Curefit invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit:
Curefit is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit!
